title: Documentation, APIs, Licenses, and Generated-Artifact Gates · Gate Lens: Api Schema
summary: Keep human and machine contracts synchronized with implementation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates api schema increment in a documentation and contract drift suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Validate API schemas, generated clients, migrations, and compatibility changes.
Test README setup and core commands from a clean environment.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Api Schema evidence
